purpose: Machine-readable record of discovery, review, normalization, risk, catalog, and package value events.

events.summary: Installed board-driven heartbeat protocol so Skills operators prioritize discovery restoration, risk review, package-facing skill quality, and catalog parity over status-only churn.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-restore-discovery-handoff-001
events.summary: Consumed the discovery handoff repair ticket, confirmed canonical latest.json is absent while producer workflow/scripts exist, documented the connector-visible blocker, queued a metadata-only manual discovery fallback, and preserved package/risk gates.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-risk-review-mcp-tool-poisoning-001
events.summary: Removed a package-facing risk blocker by converting the MCP/tool-poisoning and SSRF audit skill into a high-risk, requires_review defensive wrapper.
Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after the MCP/tool-poisoning and SSRF risk review.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-manual-discovery-fallback-001
events.summary: Recorded four real public metadata-only candidates and opened a source-review queue while preserving no-copy/no-execute/no-publication boundaries.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-source-review-batch-001
events.summary: Reviewed manual candidates; created source profiles/watch/risk/normalization queues only where justified.
Classified OpenClaw runtime/account/browser/cron/gateway surfaces and allowed only generic original runtime-surface safety patterns.
Created an original medium-risk, requires_review package-facing AI SDK provider/tool safety skill with attribution and no copied implementation.
Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after the AI SDK Provider Tool Safety normalization.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-metadata-backfill-batch-001
events.summary: Classified Autonomy Loop and Autoresearch Loop, stopped at Browser Trace, and opened a high-priority risk-review ticket.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-risk-review-browser-trace-001
events.summary: Converted Browser Trace into a high-risk, requires_review, authorized-read-only defensive debugging wrapper.
Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after metadata backfill and Browser Trace risk review.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-metadata-backfill-batch-002
events.summary: Classified three software-engineering skills and stopped at Diagnosing Bugs due browser/headless trace surfaces.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-risk-review-diagnosing-bugs-001
events.summary: Converted Diagnosing Bugs into a medium-risk, requires_review, repository-owner-authorized diagnostic wrapper.
Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after metadata-backfill batch 002 and Diagnosing Bugs risk review.

events.source: Skills Value Operator Reporter-only missing-ledger repair
events.summary: Initialized the missing 2026-07-09 daily status, queues, and report ledgers as Reporter-only and stopped without consuming a board ticket.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-metadata-backfill-batch-003
events.summary: Backfilled AI SEO as business/low/no-review and stopped before private-data and malware-analysis surfaces.
Converted email-header phishing investigation and Golang malware/Ghidra analysis into high-risk requires_review defensive wrappers and unblocked catalog parity.

Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after metadata-backfill batch 003 and the email-header/Golang malware risk review. Catalog counts show 1183 skills, business 47, forensics 26, security-defensive 61, high 17, low 11, medium 439, and unspecified 716. Closed the catalog gate and opened bounded metadata-backfill batch 004. No generated catalog hand-edit, package, npm, registry, or publication action occurred.
